articles.title: Iran sends tankers loaded with oil past US military blockade
articles.description: Three Iranian tankers loaded with crude oil have passed the US blockade line in the Gulf of Oman, ship-tracking data shows.

articles.title: PM warns Burnham against immediate leadership challenge if he wins by-election
articles.description: Keir Starmer says Labour should focus on a subsequent Manchester mayoral race if Andy Burnham wins in Makerfield.

articles.title: Can Bellingham become England's superstar once more at the World Cup?
articles.description: After tough love from England head coach Thomas Tuchel, Jude Bellingham's World Cup build-up points to a special talent who can be a key figure in their quest to win the World Cup.

articles.title: BBC announces 550 job cuts as first part of £500m savings plan
articles.description: In an email to staff, the corporation laid out proposals for the initial 200 job losses in the news division.
